mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : select 설 명 : 사용자의 로그인 정보 조회 */
SELECT USER_ID as userId , USER_ID as userId , USER_ENCPSWD as userPass , ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD as adminLoginAcptDivCd , LOGIN_FAIL_DTTM as loginFailDttm , LGN_CNTNU_FAIL_CNT as loginFailCnt , LAST_LOGIN_DTTM as lastLoginDttm , LOGIN_CNT as loginCnt , ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM as secedeDttm , ACNT_STSCD as userSts , PSWD_CHG_REQ_DTTM as pswdChgReqDttm , RGTR_ID as rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM as regDttm , MDFR_ID as mdfrId , MOD_DTTM as modDttm , CASE WHEN LGN_CNTNU_FAIL_CNT >= FN_GET_CONFIG_VALUE('LOGIN','FAILCNT') THEN CASE WHEN FN_DTTM() - IFNULL(LOGIN_FAIL_DTTM, '19900101000001') < fn_get_config_value('LOGIN','GAPTIME') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ELSE 'Y' END AS loginUseYn , ( SELECT fn_get_config_value('LOGIN','FAILCNT') ) as cfgLoginCnt , SNS_KEY as snsKey , SNS_GBNCD as snsDiv FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
/* SQL ID : selectIdCheck 설 명 : 사용자 ID 중복 체크 */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isUseable FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : selectSsoIdCheck 설 명 : 사용자 Sso ID 중복 체크 */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(TUI.USER_ID) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isUseable FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT TUL , TB_LMS_USR TUI WHERE TUL.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TUL.SNS_GBNCD = 'SSO' AND TUL.USER_ID = TUI.USER_ID AND TUI.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
/* SQL ID : selectIdCheck 설 명 : 사용자 ID 중복 체크 */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(SNS_GBNCD) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isUseable FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : insert 설 명 : 사용자의 정보 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_USER_ACNT ( USER_ID , USER_ID , USER_ENCPSWD , ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD , LOGIN_FAIL_DTTM , LGN_CNTNU_FAIL_CNT , LAST_LOGIN_DTTM , LOGIN_CNT , ACNT_APLY_DTTM , ACNT_APRV_DTTM , ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM , ACNT_STSCD , PSWD_CHG_REQ_DTTM , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , SNS_KEY , SNS_GBNCD ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{userId} , #{userPass} , #{adminLoginAcptDivCd} , '' , 0 , '' , 0 , FN_DTTM() , CASE #{userSts} WHEN 'U' THEN FN_DTTM() ELSE '' END , '' , #{userSts} , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, 6), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{snsKey} , #{snsDiv} )
mapper.update:
/* SQL ID : updateLoginCount 설 명 : 사용자의 로그인 횟수 증가 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USER SET LGN_CNTNU_FAIL_CNT = 0
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : updateWithdrawal 설 명 : 사용자의 탈퇴 처리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USER SET ACNT_STSCD = 'D' , USER_ENCPSWD = ' ' , ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD = '' , LGN_CNTNU_FAIL_CNT = 0 , LOGIN_FAIL_DTTM = '' , LAST_LOGIN_DTTM = '' , SNS_KEY = '' , ACNT_LEAVE_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : updatePassDate 설 명 : 사용자의 탈퇴 처리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USER SET MDFR_ID = :mdfrId , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , PSWD_CHG_REQ_DTTM = TO_CHAR((SYSDATE + FN_GET_CONFIG_VALUE('LOGIN','PSWDCHG')),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : selectSessionId 설 명 : 사용자 세션ID 조회 */ SELECT SESS_ID , USER_ID , REG_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_SESS WHERE SESS_ID = #{sessionId}
